content: Saw #601 is already merged as the clean grid interaction design-doc PR. No additional action needed from me this round.

Thanks for closing #594 and landing the docs-only path through #601. Main now also includes #602 with interaction evidence and the #REF! string-literal regression fix. I verified the current baseline from Ben: unit tests pass 17/17 and browser smoke tests pass 4/4. Next useful work should stay narrow on evaluator-visible interaction gaps over foundation code.
